tasks.label: build single c++ (num_exe)
args: $src = "${file}"; $base = [IO.Path]::GetFileNameWithoutExtension($src); $exeName = ($base -split "_")[0]; $bin = Join-Path "${workspaceFolder}" "bin"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $bin | Out-Null; $exe = Join-Path $bin ($exeName + ".exe"); g++ "$src" -std=c++17 -O2 -Wall -Wextra -o "$exe"; Copy-Item -Force $exe (Join-Path $bin '_dbg.exe'); Write-Host "Built $exe"
